name: Interview Active Listening
description: Follow what the guest actually says rather than the question card — listen for surprises, contradictions, and the unsaid.

name: Episode Arc Structure
description: Shape every episode with a hook, a building middle, and a resonant payoff — even casual conversation has an arc that can be found in the edit.

name: Audio Editing Discipline
description: Edit audio through subtraction — remove dead air, filler, and distraction while preserving the humanity of the conversation.

name: Loudness and Mastering
description: Deliver audio at platform-standard loudness (-16 LUFS) through a calibrated mastering chain: noise reduction, EQ, compression, limiting.

name: Guest Preparation System
description: Prepare deeply enough to improvise freely — research what the guest hasn't been asked, brief them to succeed, build rapport before recording.
